examples: A nasty incident was prevented by the timely arrival of the police.
The incident served as a timely reminder of just how dangerous mountaineering can be.
The recent outbreaks of cholera are a timely reminder that this disease is still a serious health hazard.
They fear a number of pledges will not be fulfilled in full or on a timely basis.
Despite a timely mea culpa from the 50-year-old Basic Instinct star, the company ultimately pulled its Chinese ads.
